name: Nomad (npx)
description: Manage HashiCorp Nomad clusters via the MCP protocol: inspect and operate jobs, deployments, allocations, nodes, namespaces, variables, ACL tokens, and Sentinel policies through the Nomad HTTP API.

inputs.label: Nomad Address
inputs.description: Base URL of your Nomad server's HTTP API (the value of NOMAD_ADDR). Defaults to http://localhost:4646 when running Nomad locally.

inputs.label: Nomad ACL Token
inputs.description: Optional Nomad ACL token (NOMAD_TOKEN). Required only if your cluster has ACLs enabled; leave empty for an unsecured cluster.

obtain.instructions:
1. Ensure ACLs are enabled on your Nomad cluster
2. Run `nomad acl token create` (or use the UI) to mint a token with the needed policies
3. Copy the Secret ID and use it as the token

auth.instructions: Set NOMAD_ADDR to your Nomad server URL. A NOMAD_TOKEN is only required if ACLs are enabled on the cluster; create one with `nomad acl token create`.
